programme.title: CNN Newsroom
programme.desc: The latest news and information from around the world.

programme.title: Smerconish
programme.desc: Michael Smerconish tackles the American political and news stories of the week, offering only one kind of talking point: his own.

programme.title: The Amanpour Hour
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour, CNN's chief international anchor, brings valuable insight to the biggest global and domestic news stories of the week.

programme.title: World Sport
programme.desc: Daily sports show features major stories and issues making news in the world of sports.

programme.title: African Voices Playmakers
programme.desc: African Voices Playmakers brings you the stories of athletes and sporting legends from the continent making an impact globally.

programme.desc: Live context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.desc: Inside Africa takes its viewers on a journey across Africa, exploring the true diversity and depth of different cultures, countries and regions.

programme.title: Connecting Africa
programme.desc: We profile the people, projects and companies revolutionizing African business and bringing the continent together.

programme.title: Inside Politics
programme.desc: Manu Raju leads an in-depth conversation on the week's most important political storylines, with a diverse set of analysts and news-making interviews.

programme.title: U.S. State of the Union Address
programme.desc: Jake Tapper and Dana Bash bring together major newsmakers, analysts and experts to tackle pressing domestic issues and diplomacy on the global stage.

programme.desc: Fareed Zakaria brings viewers his insights and analysis, and interviews world leaders.
